battleship.name: Battleship
battleship.description: Place your fleet and sink the enemy ships.
battleship.how_to_play:
Place your fleet of 10 ships on the 10×10 grid: 1 Battleship (4 cells), 2 Cruisers (3), 3 Destroyers (2), 4 Submarines (1).
Ships cannot touch each other, not even diagonally.
Click a placed ship to remove and reposition it.
Take turns firing at your opponent's grid — a hit earns an extra shot, keep firing until you miss!
Sink all 10 enemy ships to win.
battleship.remove_hint: Click a placed ship to remove it.
